sprint: Sprint 3 follow-up — Trim Trash/Keep split, brush deselect, zoom slider
task: Direct feedback on the Edit screen's tool panel: (1) Trim Picture's drawn box previously only ever specified what to KEEP, contradicting the everyday meaning of 'trim' -- added a second action, Trash It (a new hard-edged eraseRect, recorded onto the shared Oops!/Redo brush history rather than the crop-specific Undo Trim), alongside the existing Keep This crop. (2) Once a brush tool (Remove More/Bring It Back) was active there was no way to turn it off -- re-clicking the already-active brush size now deselects the tool back to pan mode; picking a different size still just switches. (3) Added a plain picture zoom slider (kidZoomSlider) standing in for the hidden technical zoom buttons, wired to zoomProcessed via its own split onChange callback so it only ever reflects the picture actually being edited and stays in sync with wheel-zoom/fit in both directions. Verified via Playwright end to end, including re-confirming the Quality Contract holds for the new Trash It export path (0 RGB mismatches at every fully-opaque pixel, fully transparent inside the trashed rect) after an initial verification pass's false-positive mismatches were traced to a canvas-readback premultiplication artifact in the test's own method, not a real defect. Full existing regression suite unchanged.
